title: Wicked Mini Stationery Backpack Surprise Set of 3 – Pink Green & Black Filled Backpacks with Notebooks Pens Stickers & Accessories – Kids Stationery Gift Set - Stocking Fillers - Party Bag Toys
features: SET OF THREE WICKED MINI BACKPACKS: Includes Pink, Green and Black themed mini backpacks, each packed with surprise stationery items children love to unbox, collect and play with.

MAGICAL STATIONERY SURPRISES INSIDE: Each backpack contains assorted themed goodies such as mini notebooks, pens, stickers, keyrings and accessories (contents vary by design), keeping the excitement alive with every reveal.
PERFECT STOCKING FILLER GIFT SET: Ideal for Christmas stockings, party bags, kids’ birthdays, rewards and everyday gifting; a brilliant choice for fans of magical stories and imaginative play.

COMPACT & COLLECTIBLE DESIGN: Each mini backpack measures approx. 10cm x 8cm and features vibrant Wicked-inspired artwork with a soft faux-leather feel, making them fun to use, display or attach to school bags.
INSPIRE CREATIVITY & ROLEPLAY: Encourages drawing, writing, note-taking and pretend play while offering a portable stationery kit children can take anywhere; suitable for ages 4+.
OFFICIAL WICKED THEMED RANGE: Designed with signature Wicked: For Good styling, ensuring authentic detailing, high-quality finishing and a magical unboxing experience every time.
description: Bring a touch of Oz-inspired magic to your child’s stationery collection with this enchanting Wicked Mini Stationery Backpack Surprise Set. This premium 3-pack includes Pink, Green and Black themed mini backpacks, each filled with surprise stationery treasures that spark creativity and imagination. Every miniature backpack features its own unique Wicked: For Good design and a soft faux-leather style feel. Children will love discovering what’s inside – from tiny notebooks and pens to stickers, keychains and themed accessories. Each pack offers a fun unboxing moment and hours of creative enjoyment. Compact at approx. 10cm x 8cm , these collectible backpacks are perfect for attaching to school bags, decorating desks or using as playful roleplay props. Their small size also makes them ideal for gifting, especially as Christmas stocking fillers, party bag toys, rewards or little treats for Wicked fans and young creatives alike. Whether you’re looking for a magical gift set or a unique stationery surprise bundle, this set of three Wicked Mini Backpacks delivers creativity, charm and collectability in every box. Includes: 3 themed mini backpacks – Pink, Green & Black Assorted stationery surprises inside each backpack (contents vary by style) Suitable for ages 4+
